defaultChanges.reason: 98.8% of customer environments use 40s. 10s causes data loss.
100% adoption. Every new customer deployment will miss Linkerd without this.
Security hardening. HttpOnly=false exposes session cookies to XSS.
1s preStop causes dropped requests during rolling updates.
83.1% of customers use 30s. 10s is too aggressive.
Customers use 600s. 3600s wastes ALB connection slots.
All customers have access logs. Default should be on.
96.1% adoption. Provides a safe default instead of requiring explicit override.
All customers need sticky sessions for dotCMS stateful sessions.
78.6% adoption. Should be on by default.
No customer uses local DB. Default creates dead resources.
0% of customers have prometheus pod annotations. Verify with platform team.

missingFeatures.feature: Separate ALB healthcheck path/port (independent from readinessProbe)
feature.glowroot block in values.yaml (currently only in helpers)
feature.redisSessions block in values.yaml (currently only in helpers)
VantaNonProd tag conditioned on environment name
serviceAccount.create: true as default (customers all need service accounts)
Custom NetworkPolicy support (for customers with non-standard policies)

refactoringOpportunities.currentState: Two separate values paths for stickiness: ingress.alb.hosts.stickySessions AND ingress.alb.targetGroup.stickiness. Only one is read by the helper (wrong one).
refactoringOpportunities.proposedState: Single path: ingress.alb.targetGroup.stickiness. Remove ingress.alb.hosts.stickySessions entirely.
refactoringOpportunities.benefit: Eliminates BUG-006 and BUG-007. Single source of truth for stickiness config.

refactoringOpportunities.currentState: Both kubernetes.io/ingress.class annotation and spec.ingressClassName are set.
refactoringOpportunities.proposedState: Remove deprecated annotation. Use only spec.ingressClassName.
refactoringOpportunities.benefit: Fixes BUG-002. ALB controller v2.4+ behavior is deterministic.

refactoringOpportunities.currentState: Glowroot and Redis session features are implemented in _helpers.tpl but have no corresponding values.yaml block. Users cannot discover these features.
refactoringOpportunities.proposedState: Add a top-level 'feature:' block in values.yaml with glowroot, redisSessions, analytics sub-sections, each with enabled: false/true and relevant config.
refactoringOpportunities.benefit: Self-documenting chart. Helm docs generation (helm-docs) will auto-document these features.
